channel.title: summarizedStoriesMainNLpolitics
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from summarizedStoriesMainNLpolitics, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Revenge of the AI bubble
item.description: The AI bubble debate has lurched through at least three frenzied phases in the span of three years: Suspicion: Historic sums of capital poured into AI...

item.title: Trump suggests U.S. taking stake in AI companies could be beneficial
item.description: President Trump surprised tech CEOs by proposing the U.S. take a small ownership stake in AI firms, so the American people could share in the benefits.

item.title: Medical innovation reaches a breakthrough moment
item.description: Decades of scientific investment have paid off recently, with researchers announcing promising breakthroughs against cancers and other diseases.

item.title: Exclusive: Trump's Iran envoys quietly meet nuclear experts in Tennessee
item.description: President Trump's envoys Steve Witkoff and Jared Kushner traveled to Oak Ridge National Laboratory in Tennessee for consultations with a team of nuclear experts.
